title: Fabric-multiplayer
description: A Modpack aiming to achieve a performant version of Minecraft with many QoL improvements as well as some Features that need to be enabled Serverside like Proximity Voicechat or Veinmining
body:
Fabric-Multiplayer

is a Modpack aiming to achieve a performant version of Minecraft with many QoL improvements as well as some Features that need to be enabled Serverside like Proximity Voicechat or Veinmining

Features include:

- Proximity Voicechat (requires Serverside support)

- Veinmining (requires Serverside support)

- Emotes (requires Serverside support)

- Schematics

- Minimap

- Waypoints

- Improved Villager Trading

- HUD additions
